nasb.text: If you ever take your neighbor’s cloak as a pledge, you are to return it to him before the sun sets,

esv.text: If ever you take your neighbor’s cloak in pledge, you shall return it to him before the sun goes down,

cnv.text: 如果你拿了鄰居的衣服作抵押，必須在日落之前歸還給他。

ccb.text: 倘若他把衣服给你作抵押，你要在日落之前把衣服还给他。
